title: GI Bleeding
subtitle: Understanding gastrointestinal bleeding and what to expect
description: Clear, evidence-based information about gastrointestinal bleeding — what it looks like, common causes, how it is investigated, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
